# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

Resources:
  Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-087654321
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - sg-123456789
      KeyName: my-key-pair
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64Encode: |
          #!/bin/bash
          sudo yum update -y
          # Install application and dependencies
          # ...

  Volume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
      Size: 8

  MountPoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref Instance
      VolumeId: !Ref Volume
      Device: /dev/sdf

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Value: !Ref Instance
